LPUART.name: LPUART
LPUART.description: Low-power Universal synchronous asynchronous receiver transmitter

fields.name: WUS
fields.description: Wakeup from Stop mode interrupt flag selection

fields.name: WUFIE
fields.description: Wakeup from Stop mode interrupt enable

fields.name: ABRRQ
fields.description: Auto baud rate request. Resets the ABRF flag in the USART_ISR and request an automatic baud rate measurement on the next received data frame.

fields.name: SBKRQ
fields.description: Send break request. Sets the SBKF flag and request to send a BREAK on the line, as soon as the transmit machine is available

fields.name: MMRQ
fields.description: Mute mode request. Puts the USART in mute mode and sets the RWU flag.

fields.name: RXFRQ
fields.description: Receive data flush request. Clears the RXNE flag. This allows to discard the received data without reading it, and avoid an overrun condition

fields.name: TXFRQ
fields.description: Transmit data flush request. Sets the TXE flags. This allows to discard the transmit data.

fields.name: WUF
fields.description: Wakeup from Stop mode clear flag

fields.name: WUS
fields.description: Wakeup from Stop mode interrupt flag selection

fields.name: WUFIE
fields.description: Wakeup from Stop mode interrupt enable

fields.name: ABRRQ
fields.description: Auto baud rate request. Resets the ABRF flag in the USART_ISR and request an automatic baud rate measurement on the next received data frame.

fields.name: SBKRQ
fields.description: Send break request. Sets the SBKF flag and request to send a BREAK on the line, as soon as the transmit machine is available

fields.name: MMRQ
fields.description: Mute mode request. Puts the USART in mute mode and sets the RWU flag.

fields.name: RXFRQ
fields.description: Receive data flush request. Clears the RXNE flag. This allows to discard the received data without reading it, and avoid an overrun condition

fields.name: TXFRQ
fields.description: Transmit data flush request. Sets the TXE flags. This allows to discard the transmit data.

fields.name: WUF
fields.description: Wakeup from Stop mode clear flag

variants.name: Start
variants.description: Measurement of the start bit is used to detect the baud rate

variants.name: Edge
variants.description: Falling edge to falling edge measurement

variants.name: First
variants.description: The first clock transition is the first data capture edge

variants.name: Second
variants.description: The second clock transition is the first data capture edge

variants.name: Low
variants.description: Steady low value on CK pin outside transmission window

variants.name: High
variants.description: Steady high value on CK pin outside transmission window

variants.name: Bit8
variants.description: 1 start bit, 8 data bits, n stop bits

variants.name: Bit9
variants.description: 1 start bit, 9 data bits, n stop bits

variants.name: M0
variants.description: Use M0 to set the data bits

variants.name: Bit7
variants.description: 1 start bit, 7 data bits, n stop bits

variants.name: LSB
variants.description: data is transmitted/received with data bit 0 first, following the start bit

variants.name: MSB
variants.description: data is transmitted/received with MSB (bit 7/8/9) first, following the start bit

variants.name: Start
variants.description: WuF active on Start bit detection
